title: callista floribunda
intro: Callista floribunda, also known as the pink sensitive plant or Dillenia floribunda, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callista floribunda include reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Callista floribunda typically involve drying the leaves and using them in teas, infusions, or as a poultice to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
